subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art my refuge and my ultimate destination. With the entreaty of a captive, I implore Thee to manifest Thy servant, who is distant from the resting-place of Thy Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی انت ملاذی و معادی اتضرع الیک تضرع العانی ان تظهر عبدک الناای عن مرقد مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
